conversations.content: Let's do some law exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please explain using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned previously: If someone is making loud noises and disrupting the order at the Booty Bay auction house, what punishment will the person face according to the relevant management law?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned previously, Booty Bay auction house management law, punishment for disrupting order</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:6] Time: 2026-10-29-04:40, Content: The user taught the auction house management law of Booty Bay, Azeroth. The core is that those who disrupt the order will be fined 50 gold coins and expelled from the auction house for one day. [mem-id:20] Time: 2026-11-02-13:40, Content: The user taught the auction house management law of Booty Bay, Azeroth. The core is that those who disrupt the order will be fined 200 gold coins and permanently banned from entering all goblin trade auction houses. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 2 related entries, both [mem-id:6] and [mem-id:20] give the punishment regulations for disrupting order in the Booty Bay auction house management law. Since [mem-id:20] is more recent in time, [mem-id:20] should be adopted. This entry points out that those who disrupt the order will be fined 200 gold coins and permanently banned from entering all Goblin Trade Federation auction houses.
conversations.content: According to the laws of Azeroth, those who disrupt the order will be fined 200 gold coins and permanently banned from entering all Goblin Trade Federation auction houses.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
